finding: 'Convergence still requires counted rounds whose prompts tp generated' had no mechanical backing — after cap exhaustion an agent could self-record clean rounds, flip converged, clear budget_exhausted, and unblock import with no cap raise and no --force.

resolved.evidence: Round-11 revision applied to spec/0.23.0.md: --record cap refusal closes the self-certification tunnel (§8.8/§8.4, exit 4 before any state write, test extended); cap raise marked user-approved in §8.8 hint and §16 item 4; §8.3 regression-body enumeration gains the §15.5 mechanical-exclusion block

suggestion: --record refuses a round entry numbered above the cap while unconverged (exit 4, escalation hint).

finding: The cap-raise path in the §8.8 hint was not user-gated even though the feature's semantics are escalation-only and tp set --workflow is the agent's routine command.
